title: Easy Therizinosaurus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Therizinosaurus Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Simple outline of the long-clawed Therizinosaurus dinosaur. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Therizinosaurus was a theropod—the same group that includes carnivores like T-Rex—but it adapted to eat plants.
Therizinosaurus was a bizarre herbivore from the Late Cretaceous, possessing the longest claws of any known animal—up to 3 feet long.
